description: React component for displaying a queue of high-risk insurance claims, including fetching data from an API, rendering a table, and handling user interactions such as refreshing the queue and viewing claim details.

methods.name: QueuePage()
methods.description: Main React functional component rendering the high-risk claims queue page with data fetching and user interaction logic.

methods.name: load
methods.description: Asynchronous function to fetch and set the high-risk claims queue data.

methods.name: openClaim
methods.description: Function to handle opening the claim detail modal for a selected claim.
